D-ID

Turn photos into talking head videos with AI

7/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$5.99/moStarting Price
2017Founded
Free Plan Available

About D-ID

D-ID is a ai video platform founded in 2017. It positions itself as “Turn photos into talking head videos with AI” and is best suited for developers needing talking head API, quick avatar videos. Pricing starts at $5.99/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To VideoYes
Image To VideoYes
Avatar Talking HeadYes
Screen RecordingNo
Auto CaptionsNo
TemplatesNo
Stock FootageNo
Voice OverYes
Api AccessYes
Batch ProcessingYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Affordable entry price
  • Strong API
  • Animate any photo
  • Fast processing

Cons

  • Quality below Synthesia/HeyGen
  • Limited templates
  • Short video duration limits
